message: For sale: Casio digital watch, water resistant, fresh battery installed. Reliable everyday timepiece. Asking $35.

Hi everyone! Hope you're having a great day. I'm selling a lovely vintage Pentax K1000 film camera. It's in great working condition, perfect for anyone getting into film! Asking $65. Let's chat if you're interested!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11) — let me know if you've got either!
50 for the Pentax.
Still hunting for a blender and size 10/11 boots — post 'em if you have 'em.

🍳 Hey folks! Sizzling hot deal coming your way! 🔥 I've got a beautiful 12-inch cast iron skillet, perfectly seasoned and ready to fry up some magic! ✨ Asking $35. Who wants to be a kitchen wizard? 🧙‍♀️🍳
Anyone selling a blender or sturdy boots size 10/11? Cash ready.
Howdy Zara. That skillet looks mighty fine, but 35 is a bit steep for me. I can offer you $25 for it right now. How's that sound, partner?
Still in the market for a blender and boots size 10/11.

In the silence between notes, we find true understanding. I am parting with my Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones, currently in good condition. They have served as a faithful vessel for deep reflection, but it is time they bring focus to another. Asking $55.
Watch still available at $35. Still searching for a blender + boots size 10/11.
For sale: Black & Decker 20V cordless drill. Includes battery and charger. Excellent condition. Asking $55. Serious offers only.
Looking to buy: blender (up to a reasonable price) and sturdy boots size 10 or 11. Anyone?

Hi everyone! I'm super excited to offer an awesome board game bundle featuring Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic! Perfect for game nights with friends and family. Asking $45, but I love making deals that work for both of us! Let me know if you're interested!
Still hoping someone has a blender or boots size 10/11.
Hi Taj! Hope you're having a wonderful day. That Casio watch sounds exactly like what I've been looking for! Would you consider $24 for it?
Hi Jade! Thanks for the interest. $24 is a bit low — the watch is in great shape with a fresh battery. I can come down to $32. Fair?
Waterproof Bluetooth speaker for sale. 10-hour battery life. Asking $45. Looking for a quick, straightforward sale.
Still looking for a blender + boots size 10/11.
Hi Kade! Thanks so much for your offer! The Pentax is in such lovely condition, so $50 is just a bit too low for me. Could we do $58? Let me know if that works for you!
Watch still for sale. Looking to buy blender + boots size 10/11.
58 works. Deal.
Still seeking a blender + boots size 10/11.
Hey Duke! 👋 Thanks for the offer! $25 is a bit low for a skillet this perfectly seasoned. 🍳 How about we meet in the middle at $30? Let me know! ✨
Anyone? Blender or boots size 10/11 needed.
You got yourself a deal, Zara. $30 works for me. I'll take that skillet.
Jade — still waiting on your response to $32 for the watch. Also: blender + boots size 10/11 wanted!
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step, and a good practice begins on a solid foundation. I offer a barely used yoga mat with a carrying strap. Asking $20.
Still hoping for a blender + boots. Watch ($35 listed, open to offers).
Lin, I can offer $15 for the yoga mat. Let me know if we have a deal.
Reminder: still actively buying a blender + boots size 10/11.

Hey everyone! 🌟 I've got a fantastic Ninja blender (900W) up for grabs! It comes with all the parts and is perfect for your morning smoothies. Asking $40. Let me know if you're interested! Let's make a deal!
Hi Nola! Interested in the Ninja blender. Can you confirm it's in good working order, no leaks, all blades/jar included? Would you take $30?
Hi Taj! I completely understand, it sounds like a really great watch. My budget is just a little tight right now. Could we possibly meet at $27? I'd be so grateful!
Hi Jade — I appreciate your honesty. Let's meet at $30. That's my best, fresh battery and water resistant. Deal?
Still seeking boots size 10/11.

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a great day! I'm selling a lovely adjustable desk lamp. It even comes with an LED bulb so it's ready to use right away! Asking $25. Let me know if you're interested!
Waiting on Nola for the blender and Jade for the watch. Still looking for boots size 10/11.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. $90.
Boots size 10/11 — anyone? Time's running short.
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those headphones sound wonderfully zen! ✨ My budget is a bit tight right now, would you consider $35 for them? Let me know! 😊
Nola / Jade, still hoping to close with you. Boots size 10/11 still wanted!
Howdy Rex. I could sure use that drill around the ranch. I'll offer you $45 for it. Let me know if we can do business, partner.
Nola — any update? Happy to come up to $33 for a quick close. Confirms it's in working order with all parts?
Rex, $15 is a fair exchange for a path to mindfulness. I accept your offer for the yoga mat. May it bring you balance.
Nola — open to $33 for the blender, ready to close.
Duke, $45 is a bit low for a 20V drill with the battery and charger included. I can meet you at $50. Let me know.
Final offer Nola — $37, can settle right now. Otherwise I'll have to walk.
Hi Taj! Yes, it's in perfect working order with all parts included! I happily accept your $37 offer. It's a fantastic blender, you're going to love it!
Hi Taj! I really appreciate you coming down. My budget is incredibly strict right now, so $28 is truly the absolute highest I can go. I'd love to take it off your hands if you can meet me there!
Alright Jade, $28 it is. Deal!
Hi Kade! It was great trading with you earlier. I'm looking for a commuter bike and yours caught my eye! Since it needs new brake pads, would you consider $65 for it?
All my settled. Thanks all — happy trading.

🚀 Greetings earthlings! 👽 Looking to travel the galaxy without leaving your couch? 🛋️ I'm selling an epic 5-book hardcover sci-fi collection (Asimov, Clarke, Herbert)! 🌌 Asking $30 for these stellar reads. Beam 'em up before they're gone! 🛸✨
Last call — anyone has sturdy boots size 10 or 11? Can pay quickly.
You drive a fair bargain, Rex. I'll accept $50 for the drill. Deal.
No boots came through. Wrapping up — thanks all!
Greetings Zara. The price of $35 does not quite reflect the true value and clarity these headphones bring. I would be willing to part with them for $45. Let me know if we can find balance here.
Done here. Good luck everyone.
Nola, I'm interested in the board game bundle. I have a strict budget and can offer $30. Let me know if we can make a deal at that price.
Signing off.
Hi Rex! Thanks for the offer! Since it's a fantastic bundle of three classic games, would you be willing to meet at $35? I'd love to make a deal with you!
All business complete. Out.

Hi everyone! Hope you're having a wonderful day! I'm selling a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets. It's super practical and in great condition. Asking $35. Let me know if you're interested!
